flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Reed College rose 60% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.5k → $21.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Reed College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Reed College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.7k → $69.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Reed College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.7k → $69.3k).
